title: Time Enchants
description: Adds over 23 powerful custom enchantments to Minecraft 1.21.1, including flight, teleportation, lifesteal, and more to enhance gameplay and exploration.
body:
# ⏳ **World Time: Time Enchants**

A **Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge)** mod created by the **World Time Team**, designed to enhance your gameplay with **over 23 powerful custom enchantments**, magical utilities, and even **infinite-level upgrades** for vanilla enchantments.

---

## ⚡ **Main Features**

### ✨ **Custom Enchantments**

1. **No Fall** *(Lv. 1–3)*
   • Reduces or completely removes fall damage.
   • Applies to boots.
   • Level 3 fully negates fall damage.

2. **Auto Repair** *(Lv. 1–6)*
   • Automatically repairs items over time.
   • Higher levels increase repair speed or chance.
   • Applies to any repairable item.

3. **Fly** *(Lv. 1–3)*
   • Allows creative-style flight.
   • Applies to chestplates.
   • Higher levels grant faster flight speed.

4. **Click TP** *(Lv. 1–3)*
   • Teleports the player to where they click.
   • Applies to sticks (including the “Special Teleport Stick”).
   • Higher levels increase range.

5. **Lifesteal** *(Lv. 1–5)*
   • Heals the player for a portion of dealt damage.
   • Applies to melee weapons.

6. **Auto Smelt** *(Lv. 1–3)*
   • Instantly smelts mined ores.
   • Applies to mining tools.

7. **Magnet** *(Lv. 1–4)*
   • Pulls nearby items toward the player.
   • Applies to chestplates.

8. **Night Vision** *(Lv. 1)*
   • Grants permanent night vision while wearing a helmet.

9. **Speed** *(Lv. 1–3)*
   • Increases movement speed while wearing enchanted boots.

10. **Soulbound** *(Lv. 1)*
    • Keeps the item in your inventory after death.

11. **XP Boost** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Increases experience gained from killing mobs.

12. **Beheading** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Increases the chance of mobs dropping their heads.

13. **Fire Immunity** *(Lv. 1)*
    • Grants fire resistance and extinguishes flames.
    • Applies to chestplates.

14. **Water Mastery** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Grants water breathing and Dolphin’s Grace.
    • Applies to boots.

15. **Anti Knockback** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Reduces or negates knockback depending on the level.
    • Applies to chestplates.

16. **Mining AOE** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Breaks multiple blocks around the targeted one.
    • Applies to mining tools.

17. **Vein Miner** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Mines entire connected ore veins.
    • Applies to mining tools.

18. **Reflect Damage** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Reflects part of the damage received back to the attacker.
    • Applies to chestplates.

19. **Auto Feed** *(Lv. 1–3)*
    • Gradually restores hunger while equipped.
    • Applies to chestplates.

20. **Prosperity** *(Lv. 1–5)*
    • Adds bonus drops from ores and resources.
    • Applies to mining tools.

21. **Super Loot**
    • Increases loot drops from mobs.
    • Applies to weapons.

22. **OP Haste**
    • Drastically increases mining speed.
    • Applies to mining tools.

23. **XP Magnet**
    • Pulls XP orbs toward the player.
    • Applies to chestplates.

---

## ⚙️ **Installation**

1. Make sure you have **Minecraft 1.21.1** and **NeoForge 21.1.0+** installed.
2. Download the `.jar` file from **Modrinth**.
3. Place it inside your `mods` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft and enjoy the new enchantments!

---

## 📘 **How to Obtain Enchantments**

Custom enchantments can be obtained through:

* **Enchanting tables** (with unique rarity chances).
* **Loot chests** and structure rewards.
* **Trading** with librarian villagers.
* **Combining** items in anvils.

---

## 🎲 **Spawn Chances**

| Enchantment | Chance           |
| ----------- | ---------------- |
| No Fall     | 15%              |
| Auto Repair | 8%               |
| Fly         | 3% *(very rare)* |
| Click TP    | 2% *(very rare)* |

---

## 🧩 **Compatibility**

* **Version:** Minecraft 1.21.1
* **Loader:** NeoForge 21.1.0 or higher
* Fully compatible with most other mods.

---

## ⚖️ **License**

**MIT License**
You are free to modify, use, and redistribute this mod, as long as proper credit is given to the original authors.

---

## 🌐 **Part of the World Time Project**

**Time Enchants** is part of the **World Time** network of projects — a collection of mods, tools, and utilities designed to enhance your gameplay experience, made by and for the community.

💬 **Discord:** [https://discord.gg/AkGsvJhnJF](https://discord.gg/AkGsvJhnJF)

---

🕒 *“Time doesn’t just pass… it can also be enchanted.”* ✨

---
